productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Black Jacket
description: Composition Black jacket with the shell made of 100% cotton and lining made of 100% polyester, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, a mock neck, zippered front placket, two zippered pockets on either sides of the chest, two zippered pockets on the waist, aggressive stitch detailing and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, iron or wring Dry in shade This jacket from united colors of benetton is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with jeans and a bright tee, or wear unzipped with a monochrome tee and form fitting jeans. Ankle high boots look best with this piece. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
